commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: Whoever has a relish for Jesus Christ, has also for his word; and such as have a relish for neither, are truly deplorable. Let us pray then that God would feed us with his word, and with the holy Eucharist, that contains his body and blood, his soul and his divinity, that we may thereby grow up to salvation.

commentaries.author: Irenaeus of Lyons
commentaries.content: The doctrine of the cross; of which if any man "taste"
